Show Notes:

0:00 Bestie intro, Jason's trip recap

2:47 Sacks on hypocrisy and virtue signaling surrounding wearing masks post-vaccination, Biden's address

16:07 Pandemic lessons

30:02 Immigration, Americans self-selecting as hard workers, understanding two different types of immigration

48:04 How Darwinian free trade has negatively impacted the US middle class

1:00:44 Caitlyn Jenner for CA Governor, crime & homelessness

1:07:48 Big Tech earnings

analysis.summary: The episode covers various topics including post-vaccination virtue signaling, pandemic lessons, immigration, Caitlyn Jenner's candidacy for CA Governor, and Big Tech earnings. The hosts discuss the hypocrisy surrounding mask-wearing after vaccination and the impact of free trade on the US middle class. They also touch on crime and homelessness in California.

takeaways.text: Vaccinated people can still get COVID-19
Immigration has two types: economic and refugee
Free trade has negatively impacted the US middle class
Caitlyn Jenner is running for CA Governor on a crime platform
Big Tech earnings are a significant indicator of the economy
Crime is a major issue in California
Biden's address on pandemic response was criticized

quotes.text: Crime is the #1 issue in California
quotes.speaker: David Sacks

sentiment.notes: The hosts express concern about the impact of free trade on the US middle class and the rising crime rates in California. They also criticize the hypocrisy surrounding post-vaccination mask-wearing.

notable_moments.description: Caitlyn Jenner's candidacy for CA Governor
